ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the job */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the job */,
  "reciprocal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether reciprocal is used */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., train, evaluate) */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split of the dataset (e.g., train, test, validation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the job */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the job is run (e.g., development, production) */,
  "job_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the job in seconds */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Details of resource usage (e.g., CPU, GPU, memory) */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the experiment to which the job belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters and configuration of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process in seconds */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process in seconds */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., avg_loss, avg_penalty, avg_cost) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., training, evaluation) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_metrics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was recorded */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration (e.g., hyperparameters, environment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_configs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was recorded */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., model, dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_jobs" (
  "user_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-job relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_jobs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the job */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_versions_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Reference to the job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_comments_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
